utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all of these 6 items. Each one is specified with the required details: (1) property includes address, price, bedrooms, and notes; (2) financing includes down_payment, processing_fees, and estimated_interest_rate; (3) legal_services includes cost; (4) moving_services includes cost; (5) setup_services includes cost and list of included utilities; (6) total_budget includes a full cost breakdown. There is an additional property_surveys item, but that does not affect the required count. Therefore, all 6 out of 6 required items are fully specified.
